actions.targetSignal: People discussing team picks or fantasy-style selections.
actions.copy:
That is a bold pick. I built a small WorldCup26 game for this exact debate: pick 3 teams, track points, then join the paid leaderboard only if you want.

Free picks first:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=x&utm_medium=manual-reply&utm_campaign=worldcup26_football_openclaw&utm_content=pick-3-teams-world-cup_bold-prediction

Code: 26BC4B90CB
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Memo" --platform "X" --channel "football manual replies" --status "replied" --attempt-url "<real-x-reply-url-or-private-note>" --detail "Manual X reply from david2015bestai@gmail.com at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; target=<@handle or tweet URL>; search='pick 3 teams world cup'; code 26BC4B90CB and WorldCup26 link included" --next-action "watch replies, then run campaign-referral-activity.mjs after 15 minutes"
